verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a land of milk and honey There is a land Where we won't need money. There is a land Shining with jasper. There we shall see Our blessed Saviour.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And that's the reason We shout "Hallelujah" Praising our King across the river. That shining river Where the saints will gather There we shall see Our blessed Messiah.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Elijah has come, He has done his work already As John has said, The Bride has made ready. And now we are waiting For the coming of Jesus. For that blessed day When the Lamb shall take us.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Our hopes are bright, Our lamps are burning. And day by day Our hearts are yearning. This is the evening He will come in the morning. Then we shall wait Until the dawning.
